strengths: Strong BLUF lead that delivers the answer immediately and aligns with the verified synopsis (reconciling Kryptonian heritage with human upbringing).
Excellent structure: multiple question-based H2s, Key Takeaways, scannable short paragraphs with bolded key phrases.
Six well-formed PAA-style FAQs that answer real reader questions without padding.
Information gain via framing (reboot vs Cavill, All-Star Superman influence, Chapter One: Gods and Monsters) rather than dry summary.
No fabricated trailer descriptions — correctly avoided describing specific shots/dialogue/runtime.
weaknesses: Several specific claims (25-year-old Superman, Corenswet also playing Ultraman, Krypto modeled on Gunn's dog Ozu, dog actor Jolene, Maxwell Lord sponsoring the Justice Gang, July 7 TCL premiere, Wendell Pierce as Perry White, Skyler Gisondo as Jimmy Olsen) go beyond the supplied reference facts; while plausible and widely reported, they are unverifiable within the given grounding and slightly elevate fabrication risk.
The 'embodiment of truth, justice and the American way' phrasing is presented as a direct descriptor/near-quote without attribution.
Sources are mostly the same Wikipedia entity plus generic aggregator/official pages; only one truly authoritative external source — weak on >=3 diverse authoritative externals.
No internal links present despite rubric expectation.
Meta description (dek) is solid but could more aggressively front-load the primary keyword 'superman trailer'.
Headline is strong but 'Hopeful Reboot' edges toward editorializing rather than a single concrete claim.
